title: Shanghai Lifestyle Trip
excerpt: Luxury stays, skyline mornings and modern local experiences.

itineraryDays.title: Day 1 — Arrival & Slow Evening
itineraryDays.morning: Airport arrival and private hotel coordination are arranged before you land.
itineraryDays.afternoon: Check in slowly, rest at the hotel and adjust the evening timing around your energy.
itineraryDays.evening: Private riverside dinner with an easy skyline walk if you feel like going out.

itineraryDays.title: Day 2 — Local Rhythm
itineraryDays.morning: A slower breakfast followed by French Concession cafes and quiet neighborhood streets.
itineraryDays.afternoon: Boutique shopping, local design stops and private transport between areas.
itineraryDays.evening: Rooftop cocktails or a low-key dinner reservation with timing handled for you.
itineraryDays.stayNotes: Flexible route depending on weather and your pace.

itineraryDays.title: Day 3 — Flexible Departure
itineraryDays.morning: Wellness breakfast, final cafe time or a short local errand before checkout.
itineraryDays.afternoon: Chauffeur transfer to the airport or station with luggage coordination.
itineraryDays.evening: Optional extension support if your flight departs late.
